name: contresens
creator: neiluj
description:
Use “creacars.py” to create your own car ! You will get a long string : copy it then paste it in one of the four slots in the “cars” list in “contresens_v1_9.py”

  • play with arrow keys

  • press ok in the game over menu

  • press number from 1 o 4 in the parking
